signal-blue.$description: Signal Blue — Violet supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

deep-signal.$description: Deep Signal — Navigation links and brand mark anchors — slightly cooler and more electric than Signal Blue, reserved for chrome-level interaction

signal-sky.$description: Signal Sky — Hero section wash, large decorative panels — soft periwinkle that bathes the page in brand color without overwhelming

signal-mist.$description: Signal Mist — Secondary feature panel backgrounds — desaturated teal that recedes behind content, used to break the page rhythm without adding chroma

ink.$description: Ink — Primary body and heading text — soft black at AAA contrast on every surface, the dominant typographic color

slate.$description: Slate — Secondary body text, subdued paragraphs — cool gray with a faint violet cast that echoes the brand blue

twilight.$description: Twilight — Footer background — muted purple-black that grounds the page in a warm dark wash without pure black harshness

fog.$description: Fog — Hairline borders, dividers, footer text — the structural neutral that separates content bands

paper.$description: Paper — Page canvas — off-white that warms the stark white without going cream

white.$description: White — Light supporting surface for subtle backgrounds and section separation. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

inter.$description: Sole typeface across the entire site. Weight 800 headlines are anti-soft — paired with tight 1.07–1.14 line-heights they create near-solid blocks of type that anchor the page. Weight 600 handles buttons and subheadings with a confident mid-weight. Weight 400 body at 1.50 line-height provides generous reading rhythm. The extreme contrast between 800 display and 400 body is the typographic signature.

system-ui.$description: system-ui — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

paper.$description: Surface level 0: Page canvas — the base layer everything sits on

white.$description: Surface level 1: Card and component surfaces — elevated above Paper for product mockups and content blocks

signal-sky.$description: Surface level 2: Hero wash and large brand-color panels

signal-mist.$description: Surface level 3: Secondary feature panels — a muted teal that breaks the blue rhythm

twilight.$description: Surface level 4: Footer ground — the only dark surface, anchoring the page bottom
